belier.intro: The waxing crescent Moon grows a little bolder tonight, now 22 degrees into Leo and 6.3 percent illuminated, still lighting your fifth house of creativity and romance. Mercury retrograde continues through your fourth house, keeping domestic matters in a state of revision, while Neptune retrograde lingers in your own sign, softening the edges of your usual directness. The Cancer Sun deepens your third house, favoring careful words over impulsive ones.
belier.love: Playfulness continues to build today, a touch more confident than yesterday's first spark. Let a shared laugh or small adventure carry more meaning than you expect.
belier.work: A creative idea planted yesterday deserves another hour of attention today. Momentum is building slowly but genuinely under this growing Leo light.
belier.energy: Your fire brightens steadily, well suited to expressive or physical outlets that let you enjoy the process rather than rush the outcome.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde continues asking you to notice where you have been performing confidence rather than feeling it. Today's quiet answer is more useful than yesterday's.
belier.mantra: I let my confidence grow at its own true pace.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Leo Moon at 22 degrees continues through your fourth house, its light now noticeably fuller than yesterday's bare sliver. Mercury retrograde in your third house still asks for careful rereading of anything related to home or family communication. The Cancer Sun in your second house keeps your material sense of security warm and central to today's choices.
taureau.love: Home continues to be the true stage for intimacy today. A small act of care in your shared space speaks louder than words right now.
taureau.work: Yesterday's small financial step deserves reinforcement today rather than abandonment. Consistency, not size, is what makes this Moon phase work in your favor.
taureau.energy: Your grounded nature continues to serve you well as Mercury's retrograde asks for patience with mixed messages. Physical routines steady your mind.
taureau.intuition: A feeling about your home life that formed yesterday grows clearer today. Trust the pattern that is emerging rather than a single isolated moment.
taureau.mantra: I nurture what I have already begun to build.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The waxing Leo Moon strengthens in your third house today, its light nearly four times brighter than yesterday, encouraging bolder but still careful communication. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your own sign, so today favors clarifying what was said yesterday over introducing new topics. The Cancer Sun continues through your first house, keeping personal needs close to the surface.
gemeaux.love: A conversation begun yesterday deserves a thoughtful follow-up today. Clarify rather than complicate, and warmth will follow naturally.
gemeaux.work: Short tasks and local matters continue to move more smoothly than major decisions. Use today to tie loose ends from yesterday rather than opening new ones.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy is a little steadier today than yesterday's scattered quickness. Direct it toward finishing rather than starting.
gemeaux.intuition: A hunch from yesterday about a sibling or neighbor gains more evidence today. Notice what confirms itself without your needing to ask.
gemeaux.mantra: I finish what I started with clear, patient words.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun approaches 24 degrees in your own sign, giving you continued emotional steadiness, while the Leo Moon strengthens in your second house of security and self-worth. Mercury retrograde persists through your twelfth house, surfacing more memory and reflection than yesterday. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your career direction gently unclear, asking for one more day of patience.
cancer.love: Naming your needs continues to serve you well today, perhaps even more easily than yesterday. A partner is likely receptive to continued honesty.
cancer.work: A financial or resource decision considered yesterday can be examined a little further today, though final commitment still favors waiting.
cancer.energy: Your emotional steadiness continues to build under the Sun's presence in your sign. Use this reserve wisely rather than spending it all at once.
cancer.intuition: More fragments of memory or old feeling may surface today from your twelfth house. Together with yesterday's insight, a fuller picture is forming.
cancer.mantra: I trust the fuller picture forming inside me.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon in your own sign grows brighter today, now 22 degrees into Leo, carrying forward the intention planted at yesterday's new Moon. Mercury retrograde in your twelfth house still favors private reflection over public announcement. The Cancer Sun alongside it in your twelfth house continues to add emotional depth to this quietly powerful personal cycle.
lion.love: The private wish you held yesterday deserves continued protection today. Resist the urge to share it before it has fully taken shape.
lion.work: Your personal intention for the months ahead continues to solidify. Keep building it quietly rather than seeking outside validation just yet.
lion.energy: Your vitality continues its quiet renewal, gaining a touch more visible warmth today than yesterday's first ember.
lion.intuition: Your inner knowing continues to speak clearly through feeling. What became clear yesterday deserves to be trusted a little further today.
lion.mantra: I let my intention grow stronger in the quiet.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Leo Moon deepens in your twelfth house today, its growing light still mostly hidden from view, much like your own processing right now. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your eleventh house, continuing to complicate group plans. The Cancer Sun in your eleventh house keeps your social world emotionally significant even while some threads stay tangled.
vierge.love: Quiet, private tenderness continues to matter more than public displays today. Yesterday's solitude together can deepen into something more today if you allow it.
vierge.work: Rest and unfinished tasks remain more productive than new group ventures. Trust that Mercury's retrograde motion is protecting you from a premature decision.
vierge.energy: Restoration continues to serve you today. Notice how yesterday's rest has already sharpened your thinking.
vierge.intuition: A message from a dream or quiet moment yesterday deserves a second look today. A pattern may be emerging that a single glance would have missed.
vierge.mantra: I let rest continue to clarify my mind.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Leo Moon brightens further in your eleventh house today, its growing light warming your sense of friendship and future vision. Mercury retrograde continues through your tenth house, still asking you to revisit rather than initiate professional conversations. The Cancer Sun in your tenth house keeps your public path emotionally resonant.
balance.love: A friend's honest words from yesterday continue to settle in usefully today. Let their perspective inform rather than dictate your next step.
balance.work: The professional matter reopened by Mercury's retrograde motion deserves continued patient attention today. Refinement, not resolution, is the theme.
balance.energy: Your social energy continues its gentle renewal, a little more confident today than yesterday.
balance.intuition: Your sense of true direction sharpens further today. Notice which ambition continues to feel alive and which quietly falls away.
balance.mantra: I let my true direction reveal itself patiently.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Leo Moon continues rising in your tenth house today, its light stronger and more visible than yesterday's faint beginning. Mercury retrograde in your ninth house still asks for a second look before finalizing travel, publishing, or educational plans. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house keeps your search for meaning emotionally alive.
scorpion.love: A conversation about long-term direction continues to develop today. Patience continues to serve this process better than urgency.
scorpion.work: The intention set yesterday for your reputation and path deserves reinforcement today. Continue to hold off on finalizing travel or publishing commitments.
scorpion.energy: Your ambition burns a little brighter today, still better suited to planning than to immediate execution.
scorpion.intuition: The recurring thought from yesterday about a long-held belief continues to develop. Notice what new detail has emerged since then.
scorpion.mantra: I let my ambition build with patient conviction.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The fellow fire Moon in Leo continues to brighten your ninth house of meaning and belief today. Mercury retrograde in your eighth house still asks for care with shared resources or emotionally weighted conversations. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house continues to deepen the emotional undertone of financial or intimate matters.
sagittaire.love: The vulnerability you allowed yesterday continues to deepen a bond today. Let honesty remain your guide rather than reverting to distance or humor.
sagittaire.work: The shared financial matter or contract under review yesterday deserves one more careful look today before any agreement is finalized.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire continues to burn thoughtfully today, still more suited to reflection than to bold outward action.
sagittaire.intuition: The quiet doubt about a shared arrangement noticed yesterday deserves continued attention today. New information may be arriving.
sagittaire.mantra: I let meaning reveal itself through patient reflection.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Leo Moon deepens in your eighth house today, its light steadily growing as it asks for continued depth in intimate and financial matters. Mercury retrograde in your seventh house still favors reviewing partnership communication over signing anything new. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house keeps a significant relationship emotionally central.
capricorne.love: The partner's needs that came into focus yesterday deserve continued attention today. A second conversation often reveals what the first one missed.
capricorne.work: Contracts and negotiations continue to benefit from careful rereading rather than quick signing. Patience remains the wiser path today.
capricorne.energy: Your Capricorn discipline continues to serve patience over speed today, a quality this retrograde period particularly rewards.
capricorne.intuition: The quiet sense about a partner's true feelings noticed yesterday continues to develop. Trust the pattern forming across these two days.
capricorne.mantra: I let trust deepen one patient step at a time.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Leo Moon continues to oppose your sign from your seventh house today, its growing light keeping partnership matters at the center of attention. Pluto retrograde continues its slow inner transformation, while Mercury retrograde in your sixth house still asks for patience with daily routines and health matters. The Cancer Sun in your sixth house keeps your body's needs emotionally present.
verseau.love: The gentle intention planted yesterday for a relationship continues to take shape today. Let understanding deepen rather than demanding immediate resolution.
verseau.work: The daily routine reconsidered yesterday deserves a small refinement today rather than a full overhaul. Consistency continues to be your ally.
verseau.energy: Your body continues to ask for rhythm today. Notice how yesterday's small habit already feels a little more natural.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's ongoing work continues to surface old patterns. Notice what has shifted since yesterday in how you relate to a close partner.
verseau.mantra: I let understanding deepen naturally between us.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Leo Moon brightens further in your sixth house of daily rhythm today, encouraging continued gentle consistency in routine and service. Neptune, your ruler, remains retrograde in Aries within your second house, continuing its slow clarification of self-worth. Mercury retrograde in your fifth house still asks for patience with creative or romantic plans.
poissons.love: The romantic patience practiced yesterday continues to serve you well today. Let feelings clarify fully before acting, even if the wait feels long.
poissons.work: The routine gently planted yesterday deserves one more day of quiet reinforcement. Small, repeated effort is building more than it may appear to.
poissons.energy: Your sensitive energy continues to respond well to consistency today. Notice the small reward of yesterday's modest beginning.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's retrograde continues to clarify what you truly value. The discomfort noticed yesterday is doing important, necessary work.
poissons.mantra: I let small steps continue to compound into strength.
poissons.author: Sibylle
